subcodes.first_line: O my God, my God! Thou seest me with heart aflame, tears streaming down, and soul trembling in fear of Thy conquering might [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی ترانی مضطرم الفواد و منسجم الدموع و مضطرب القلب من خشیه سطوه قهرک
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for protection, @prayers (general or uncategorized), @the power of words; of speech
